creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is a new version with the same features from maintainer point of view.

The main differences are:
separate the code in bsd.options.mk to be clearer
separate the global description in a new bsd.options.desc.mk

remove the ability to have external dialog as it would too much
complexe to create an ui for the new featues available.

new output possible:
make pretty-print-options:
+NOPORTDOCS -NOPORTEXAMPLES -NOPORTDATA -PYTHON -RUBY -TCL -LUA -PERL
-CSCOPE -EXUBERANT_CTAGS -XTERM_SAVE -X11 X11( -X11_ONLY -ATHENA
-MOTIF -GNOME -GTK1 -GTK2 ) GRP1[ +OPT2 -OPT3 ]

regards,
Bapt
